content.body:
I’ve been maintaining the website, and I’ve increasingly found myself needing admin permissions for the repository. Even if full admin access is not possible, would it be possible to give me a role with a bit more permission for maintenance work?

The branch protection rules are great, but ever since some permissions got removed from my account, I can’t open a PR and merge it myself anymore. I mean, sure, the answer is probably “just get someone to review it”, but honestly, not many people seem that interested in this stuff, right? 😅
